notes: Rest day. Event attended (lunch). Low activity. High sleep volume (fragmented across whole day). Weight not measured — assumed same as Apr 14 (77.8kg).

sleep.notes: Image1 (17 Apr): 6h8m — overnight Apr16→17 blocks + ~1PM nap. Image2 (18 Apr): 4h30m — app attributes Apr17 evening naps (~5-10PM) to Apr18. Plus user-reported 10:15PM-2:15AM block (4hr). Total actual rest ~14hr, highly fragmented throughout the day.

meals.description: Event food: small portion rice + vermicelli noodles, veggies (corn, broccoli, mushroom), 2pc dory fish, 1 drumstick chicken curry, 1 cup fruit juice
Mongolian curry chicken rice — all chicken, 25% rice
